allowed_forward_fill_policy: Forward fill may be considered only after a value is officially observable and only until the next scheduled observation or source holiday boundary; it is not a trade blocker or approval gate.
asof_alignment_policy: XAUUSD rows may use only the latest eligible yield observation whose observation date and release timestamp are not after the XAUUSD timestamp.

candidate_series.source_url_or_reference: FRED series DGS10 reference only; no API call performed
FRED series DGS2 reference only; no API call performed
FRED series DFII10 reference only; no API call performed
FRED series DFII5 reference only; no API call performed
FRED series T10YIE reference only; no API call performed
FRED series DFF reference only; no API call performed

missing_value_policy: Missing, '.', blank, non-numeric, and source-holiday values must be flagged and excluded from label calculation unless a documented backward-only fill is valid.
no_lookahead_policy: Forward, nearest-future, or same-day pre-release alignment is disallowed. Any ambiguous timestamp policy must fail closed before label calculation.
release_timestamp_policy: Future imports must preserve an explicit release_timestamp when available. If unavailable, the series-specific official release-time assumption must be documented before intraday XAUUSD alignment is allowed.
revision_policy: Future loaders must record vintage_date when available and must not replace historical values silently; revised and vintage values need explicit provenance.
timezone_policy: observation_date is a calendar date. release_timestamp, when present, must be timezone-aware UTC or include a source timezone that can be converted to UTC.
